message:
feat(api): add ghGetWithRetry helper for rate-limit retries (Fixes #9059) (#9245)

* feat(api): add ghGetWithRetry helper for rate-limit retries (Fixes #9059)

Add ghGetWithRetry helper in pkg/api/handlers/github_pipelines.go that wraps
ghGet with exponential-backoff retries on GitHub rate-limit responses
(403 and 429).

Behavior:
- 3 retry attempts (GH_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS = 3)
- Honors GitHub's Retry-After header when present, capped at
  GH_RETRY_MAX_DELAY_MS = 10s
- Falls back to exponential backoff (GH_RETRY_BASE_DELAY_MS = 1s,
  doubling each attempt, capped at GH_RETRY_MAX_DELAY_MS)
- Honors context cancellation during backoff (no goroutine leaks)
- Backward compatible: existing ghGet unchanged, opt-in only
- Drains+closes throwaway response bodies for connection reuse

Wired two obvious call sites that hit /actions/runs and
/actions/workflows/{file}/runs — these are the most rate-limit-prone
paths in the GitHub Pipelines dashboard.

Pattern mirrors the existing driveGetWithRetry in benchmarks.go.
All retry tuning uses named constants per project conventions
(no magic numbers).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(github): nil-guard ghGetWithRetry callers for nilaway

Caller sites at github_pipelines.go:800 and :843 dereferenced the
*http.Response without a nil check, which nilaway flagged as a
potential panic. Add explicit nil guards after the err check at both
sites.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
